_comment: Copy to memory_prices.json (gitignored). You drop in contract-price prints as they come; degen.macro.memory_prices() tracks them vs the forecast. Source the forecast from sellside/expert calls; observed from TrendForce/DRAMeXchange/earnings guidance.

forecast.source: who/when (e.g. sellside expert call, via whom, date)
forecast.top_marker: what/when marks the cycle top (e.g. supply growth + a competitor catching up)
